title: error: groupadd /etc/group: lock file already used. While running buildah tekton task on OCP 4.3
body:
**Description**

Buildah bud command in Openshift pipelines task fails with error
```
groupadd: /etc/group.389: lock file already used
groupadd: cannot lock /etc/group; try again later.
  Installing : openssh-7.4p1-21.el7.x86_64                               16/100 
warning: group ssh_keys does not exist - using root
  Installing : setools-libs-3.3.8-4.el7.x86_64                           17/100 
  Installing : libselinux-utils-2.5-15.el7.x86_64                        18/100 
  Installing : policycoreutils-2.5-34.el7.x86_64                         19/100 
  Installing : libselinux-python-2.5-15.el7.x86_64                       20/100 
groupadd: /etc/group.393: lock file already used
groupadd: cannot lock /etc/group; try again later.
error: %pre(libcgroup-0.41-21.el7.x86_64) scriptlet failed, exit status 10
Error in PREIN scriptlet in rpm package libcgroup-0.41-21.el7.x86_64
error: libcgroup-0.41-21.el7.x86_64: install failed
```


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Create a buildah task with https://github.com/tektoncd/catalog/blob/v1beta1/buildah/buildah.yaml
2. Use quay.io/buildah/stable:v1.11.0 OR quay.io/buildah/stable:latest image 
3. Build a simple Dockerfile like
```
FROM centos:7
USER 0 
RUN yum install -y centos-release-scl && \
    yum install devtoolset-7 rh-python36 -y
USER 1001
```
4.The buildah task will fail on OCP 4.3


**Describe the results you received:**
Log is shown below.

**Describe the results you expected:**
buildah task should succeed.This works on openshift 3.11

```
OpenShift Version - 4.3.5
Kubernetes Version - v1.16.2
stable-4.3
```

comments.body:
Hello, have a look at this related ticket
https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/2239#issuecomment-636805071

using the storage-driver=overlay workaround fixed the issue
```command: ["buildah", "--storage-driver=overlay", "bud",...```
closing the issue as it works now.
